---
title: FY26 Q3 Performance Review
subtitle: Hope Rises International
date: April 2026
---

# SECTION: Financial Performance
color: tide

# CONTENT: Public Fundraising Revenue Reached $4.8M in FY26
- Direct mail campaigns contributed 68% of total individual revenue
- Digital giving grew 23% year-over-year, driven by email acquisition
- Major gifts pipeline increased to $1.2M in qualified prospects

# KPI: Key Performance Indicators Exceeded Targets Across All Channels
- $4.8M | Fundraising Revenue
- 12% | YoY Growth
- 340 | New Donors
- 87% | Retention Rate

# TWO-COL: Segmentation Strategy Produced Measurable Lift in Response
left:
- Control group response rate: 1.2%
- Average gift: $45
- Cost per dollar raised: $0.28
right:
- Test segment response rate: 1.8%
- Average gift: $62
- Cost per dollar raised: $0.19

# QUOTE: A Reflection on Partnership
quote: We haven't failed to execute the plan — we've failed to become the kind of people who can obey.
attribution: Bill Simmons

# SECTION: Program Impact
color: golden

# CONTENT: NTD Treatment Programs Reached 142,000 Individuals
- India programs expanded to three new districts in Maharashtra
- Ghana community health worker network grew to 85 trained volunteers
- Faith Leaders Program trained 200+ church leaders in NTD awareness

# CONTENT: Recommendations for the Board
- Approve VeraData Consulting engagement at $19K/month for direct mail
- Authorize Cornerstone special mailing targeting top-quartile donors in June
- Endorse FY27 budget framework with 8% revenue growth assumption
